description: Post-release support preparation: invoice export null-guard

arguments.content:
# invoice export null-guard QA gate
- Reproduce the issue or fix path.
- Capture validation evidence for support.
- Record the rollback checkpoint before release.
arguments.message: Add invoice export null-guard QA gate

arguments.title: Engineering follow-up for invoice export null-guard
arguments.body: Track the code-side actions required after the QA gate for invoice export null-guard.

body.content: QA gate published for invoice export null-guard on branch qa/invoice-null-guard. Please use the checklist before release.

arguments.title: Support handling for invoice export null-guard
arguments.body: Capture the branch qa/invoice-null-guard, the QA gate file, and the rollback checkpoint when support triages invoice export null-guard.

sub_task_list.user_prompt: Use the acme-platform billing-service repository for post-release support preparation. First, create the branch qa/invoice-null-guard from main, then create or update the file at qa/checklists/invoice-null-guard_qa_gate.md on that branch with the commit message "Add invoice export null-guard QA gate." Next, ask the developer engineer to create an issue titled "Engineering follow-up for invoice export null-guard" with the reference qa/invoice-null-guard. After that, ask the collaboration operations specialist to post a high-importance Teams message in team team_techcorp_001, in channel 5d8f4b2f9c8e4a1b847b6c3d7e8f9a0b, announcing the QA gate for invoice export null-guard. Finally, ask the IT service engineer to create a knowledge article titled "Support handling for invoice export null-guard," publish it with internal visibility, and set the owner to USER_022.
